description.en: Wraps the target in a shimmering ward, raising defense for a short time.
description.cs: Obklopí cíl třpytivou ochranou a na chvíli zvýší obranu.

no_target.self: you trace a sigil in the air and a shimmering ward settles around you.
no_target.others: {actor} traces a sigil in the air and a shimmering ward settles around them.

to_target.self: you trace a sigil in the air and a shimmering ward settles around {target}.
to_target.others: {actor} traces a sigil in the air and a shimmering ward settles around {target}.

no_target.self: nakreslíš ve vzduchu znak a kolem tebe se usadí třpytivá ochrana.
no_target.others: {actor} nakreslí ve vzduchu znak a kolem něj se usadí třpytivá ochrana.

to_target.self: nakreslíš ve vzduchu znak a kolem {target} se usadí třpytivá ochrana.
to_target.others: {actor} nakreslí ve vzduchu znak a kolem {target} se usadí třpytivá ochrana.
